question: When I ask for help with a video edit, what kind of resource suggestions do I prefer?
answer: Suggestions should be tailored to Adobe Premiere Pro workflows, favoring Premiere-Pro-specific panels, keyboard shortcuts, and tutorials over generic video-editing advice that does not name the tool the user actually works in.

haystack_sessions.content: I edit all of my client videos in Adobe Premiere Pro, so please keep advice specific to that app.
Understood - I will keep suggestions focused on Premiere Pro rather than generic editing tips.
Right. Generic 'use any NLE' answers waste my time; I want Premiere-Pro-specific panels and shortcuts.
